$comment: Copy to your project root as visual-diff.config.json and edit. localBase/liveBase are the two renderings to compare; pages share `path` across both. thresholdPct is the pass gate (default 0.1). You can instead keep pages in a sibling visual-diff.pages.json. A page may add an optional `sections` array (e.g. [".hero", ".pricing"]) to override --sections auto-detection.
